triggering_review.related_parlay: Cavaliers ML + Timberwolves ML + Dream ML

core_rule: Projected roster or projected rotation strength is never sufficient by itself for an official NBA Summer League wager.
verification_gate: Confirm active roster or latest availability report
Review meaningful minutes from the most recent game
Identify at least one secondary creator
Check expected rest, shutdowns, late scratches, and role reductions
Verify rotation advantage using actual usage or recent minutes
Obtain at least one independent matchup confirmation
Confirm current number remains inside cutoff after availability information
parlay_rules: Unverified Summer League sides may not be parlay legs
Every parlay leg must pass the same verification gate as a straight wager
Avoid duplicate straight and parlay exposure without explicit approval
Count duplicate exposure in the team exposure cap
Do not add heavily priced favorites that contribute little return
required_writeup_fields: reason grade remains B or lower
publishing_validation: Show number of official Summer League sides
Show verification status for each side
Identify any side duplicated in a parlay
Disclose missing roster or minutes confirmation
Explain why each play is not a Pass
supersedes: Any earlier rule allowing an official Summer League side based primarily on projected rotation quality
